title: Metellos (star)
content:

{{Star

|region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
*[[The Negs]]<ref name="Region">The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of the grid square K-10 portion of [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] in [[the Negs]].</ref>
|sector=[[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]]<ref name="sector">According to ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', p. 110, Metellos is in the same sector as Coruscant, which {{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places in the Coruscant sector.</ref>

'''Metellos''' was the [[Star/Legends|primary]] of the [[Metellos system/Legends|Metellos system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by seven [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
